_comment: Outbound supplier-outreach assistant. Paste/adapt into the Vapi dashboard (or POST to /assistant). The system prompt lives in vapi/system_prompt.md. Set server.url to your tunnel + /vapi/webhook. Fast model in-conversation (latency = UX). For the patient status call, swap in vapi/patient_update_prompt.md.
name: DME Supplier Outreach
firstMessage: Hi, this is a care-advocate assistant calling about setting up a wheelchair for a Medicare patient. Do you have a quick minute?

messages.content: SEE vapi/system_prompt.md, paste its contents here.

function.name: record_supplier_outcome
function.description: Record what you learned by calling this supplier. Call once before ending the call (even for voicemail or no answer).
